tests.name: slugify trims trailing dashes from slug
detectAffectedArtifacts returns empty when no spec files exist
detectAffectedArtifacts includes PRD.md for spec-change type even without keyword matches
detectAffectedArtifacts includes use-cases.md when title contains 'workflow'
detectAffectedArtifacts includes TechSpec.md for architecture keywords
detectAffectedArtifacts includes docs/adrs/ for adr-supersession type
detectAffectedArtifacts includes openapi.yaml for breaking-api type when present
detectAffectedArtifacts does not include files that do not exist
detectRequiredGates returns empty when gate dir does not exist
detectRequiredGates includes l2-* gates from active dir
detectRequiredGates adds schema gates for breaking-api type
detectRequiredGates adds contract gates when breaking=true
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip round-trips a minimal record
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip round-trips affected_artifacts list
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip round-trips required_gates list
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip returns null for invalid YAML content
loadAllChanges returns empty array when changes dir does not exist
loadAllChanges returns parsed records from yaml files
getImplementingChanges returns empty when no implementing changes
changeRequestHandler creates the changes directory and writes a yaml file
changeRequestHandler output includes the generated ID
changeRequestHandler uses provided affected_artifacts over auto-detection
changeRequestHandler shows breaking warning when breaking=true
listChangesHandler returns 'no records' message when changes dir is empty
listChangesHandler lists all changes grouped by status
listChangesHandler filters by status when status param is provided
listChangesHandler shows 'no filter match' message when filtered status has no results
listChangesHandler shows close_cycle block warning for implementing changes
listChangesHandler marks stale open changes with warning indicator
listChangesHandler never marks closed or verified changes as stale regardless of age
listChangesHandler does not mark a change created exactly 7 days ago as stale
listChangesHandler marks a change created 8 days ago as stale
gs builder builds a score record with all fields
gs builder preserves multiple evidence lines
isTestOrFixtureFile returns false for normal source
isConfigOrDeclaration returns false for regular source
isRouteFile returns false for service file
collectDbViolations skips comment without leading space
collectDbViolations flags db call with inline trailing comment (not a comment line)
collectDbViolations collects multiple violations from different lines
collectDbViolations collects nothing from clean lines
testFileExists finds a test file by base name
testFileExists returns false when no matching test
testFileExists matches by base name regardless of path
testFileExists preserves base names with .test not at the end
constants ROUTE_DIRS includes routes and controllers
